# Sugar-Run 100米地图说明

## 地图总览
- **总长**：100 米（5 段，每段 20 米）
- **类型**：2D 横版平台跳跃
- **风格**：类《天天酷跑》的连续跑酷

## 分段设计

### 第一段「厨房起点」(0-20m) - 草地
- 油烟灶台+汉堡陷阱
- 可乐陷阱
- 1 支胰岛素（8m 高空）
- 尖刺群（11-15m）
- 糖块（10m 处浮空）

### 第二段「餐桌跳跃」(20-40m) - 泥土
- 7 个高低平台连续跳跃
- 沙发陷阱（红方块）
- 2 处苹果回血
- 1 支胰岛素（28m）
- 可乐 + 汉堡陷阱各 1
- 全麦面包（34m）
- 尖刺群（31-33m）

### 第三段「食物工厂」(40-60m) - 石头
- 高空工厂平台（42m, 48m, 54m）
- **2 只糖怪巡逻**（43m, 50m）
- 锯子障碍（46m）
- 紧急糖块（48m 问号砖块，隐藏）
- 第 3 支胰岛素（45m）
- 5 颗糖果堆（41-43m）
- 工厂墙（蓝方块，50-51m）
- 尖刺群（56-58m）

### 第四段「血管管道」(60-80m) - 沙地
- 8 段管道连续跳跃
- **2 只糖怪**（65m, 73m）
- 红细胞漂浮物
- 第 4 支胰岛素（64m）
- 1 处苹果、1 处全麦面包
- 汉堡 + 可乐陷阱
- 尖刺跨越（78-79m）

### 第五段「诊室走廊」(80-100m) - 雪地
- 沙发陷阱（82m）
- 苹果回血
- 第 5 支胰岛素（87m）
- **糖怪**（89m）
- 可乐 + 全麦陷阱
- 终末糖怪（95m）
- **诊室门**（99m）= 终点

## 通关条件
- 抵达诊室门 (99m)
- 当前血糖 3.0-7.0 mmol/L
- 收集至少 **3 支胰岛素**（共 5 支可收集）
- 剩余生命 ≥ 1

- A / ←：向左
- D / →：向右
- W / ↑ / 空格：跳跃

## Unity Project Exploration Report — E:\unity\projs\final_proj

This is a **2D platformer "Sugar-Run" (血糖跑酷)** game about a character navigating a body/food-themed environment (kitchen → intestine interior). Uses URP 2D, TextMesh Pro, and Kenney platformer assets.

---

### 1. Scene Files (*.unity / *.scene)

**Project scenes (Assets/Scenes/):**
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense1.scene` — "厨房起点/100米跑酷" main parkour level (built by BuildMap.cs)
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense2.scene` — level 2
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense2_backup.scene` — backup of level 2
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense3.scene` — "Underground Cavern" (built by build_scenes_3_4.py)
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense4.scene` — "Sky Fortress" (built by build_scenes_3_4.py)
- `Assets\Scenes\SampleScene.scene` — the ONLY scene in build settings
- `Assets\Settings\Scenes\URP2DSceneTemplate.scene` — URP template

Plus plugin/pack scenes: 26 TextMesh Pro example `.unity` scenes + `Assets\BTM_Items_Gems\Scenes\Gems Sample Scene.unity`.

---

### 2. C# Scripts (project-specific, all read)

**Assets/Scripts/ (16 game scripts):**
- `PlayerController.cs` — Core player. Rigidbody2D platformer movement (A/D/←/→, W/↑/Space jump), ground check via OverlapBox, potion system (Q to use, drains sugar), respawn, reactivates pickups on death. Exposes `controlsReversed`, `moveSpeed`, `jumpForce`.
- `StatusUI.cs` — **Main HUD/Canvas.** Hunger & sugar bars (filled Images), value texts, potion count UI, victory panel ("恭喜通关！"). Depletes hunger/sugar over time; death triggers PlayerController.Respawn(). Has `ShowVictory()`, `AddSugar/AddHunger`, `pauseDepletion`.
- `StatusEffect.cs` — Applies status-driven effects: low-hunger near-death adrenaline (1.5x), low-stamina slowdown, high-sugar slowdown + HP drain + reverse controls when sugar<20, red screen flash overlay, camera shake loop. Tied to StatusUI & CameraFollow.
- `SugarStateVisual.cs` — Visual aura/tint based on sugar level (high>70 orange aura, low<20 blue aura), generates glow sprites procedurally, drives Animator "SugarState" int.
- `TrophyItem.cs` — **Trophy/goal.** Adds trigger BoxCollider2D; on player contact calls StatusUI.ShowVictory().
- `PlayerImmunity.cs` — Temporary invulnerability (pauses status depletion), procedural ring aura sprite, pulsing.
- `ImmunityPickup.cs` — Trigger pickup that activates PlayerImmunity on player.
- `FoodItem.cs` — Edible pickup; adds sugarBonus + hungerBonus to StatusUI. Auto-adds CircleCollider2D.
- `PotionItem.cs` — Pickup adding a potion to PlayerController (max 3).
- `CameraFollow.cs` — Ortho camera follow with dynamic zoom based on player height, exposes `shakeOffset`.
- `VideoBackground.cs` — **Video background player.** Requires VideoPlayer; renders mp4 to RenderTexture on a quad sized to camera. Default video `"大肠内部.mp4"`. Falls back to solid color.
- `AcidFlow.cs` — Animated waving liquid surface mesh (replaces SpriteRenderer with MeshRenderer).
- `MoveVertical.cs` / `MoveHorizontal.cs` — Simple sine-wave oscillating platform movement.
- `FloatObject.cs` (namespace Benjathemaker) — Rotate/float/scale animation for collectibles (used by Trophy prefab).
- `DeathZone.cs` — Trigger that respawns the player.

**Assets/Editor/ (2 editor tools):**
- `BuildMap.cs` — Menu "Tools/Build 100m Parkour Map" procedurally generates gamesense1.scene (tiles, platforms, spikes, saws, pickups, decorations) from Kenney sprites, creates prefabs.
- `FoodBaker.cs` — Menu "Tools/Bake Food Prefabs" bakes FBX food models into prefabs with FoodItem stats (Hamburger/Hotdog/Cheese/Banana/Cherry/Olive/Watermelon).

**Other:** `Assets\BTM_Items_Gems\Scripts\SimpleGemsAnim.cs` (Benjathemaker) — same float/rotate/scale anim as FloatObject, from a gems asset pack.

(TextMesh Pro `Examples & Extras\Scripts\` contains ~27 demo scripts — third-party, not project logic.)

---

### 3. "开场动画" (Opening Animation) Assets

**FOUND:** `Assets\开场动画.mp4` (opening animation video).
Additional videos in Assets root:
- `Assets\大肠内部.mp4`, `大肠内部2.mp4`, `大肠内部3.mp4`, `大肠内部4.mp4` (large-intestine interior backgrounds — used by VideoBackground.cs, default = 大肠内部.mp4).
- Animation clips: `Assets\idle.anim`, `walk.anim`, `jump.anim`, `highSugarIdle.anim`, `lowSugarIdle.anim`, `Assets\role5.controller`.
- There is NO dedicated "开场动画" folder, just the mp4 file. No script currently plays 开场动画.mp4 specifically (VideoBackground defaults to 大肠内部.mp4).

---

### 4. UI-Related Scripts / Canvas Objects

- **Scripts:** `StatusUI.cs` (HUD + victory panel, uses UnityEngine.UI + TMPro) and `StatusEffect.cs` (creates flash overlay Image on Canvas).
- **Canvas objects in scenes:** A `StatusCanvas` (with Canvas component + CanvasRenderers) exists in gamesense1.scene, gamesense2.scene, and gamesense3.scene. (gamesense4 and SampleScene were generated by the python builder and did not show a StatusCanvas.)
- Victory UI is created dynamically by StatusUI.ShowVictory() if no victoryPanel is assigned.

---

### 5. Build Settings (ProjectSettings\EditorBuildSettings.asset)

**Only 1 scene is in the build, in this order:**
1. `Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.scene` (enabled, guid 8c9cfa26abfee488c85f1582747f6a02)

⚠️ NOTE: The actual game levels (gamesense1–4) are NOT in the build settings — only SampleScene is. `build_scenes_3_4.py` (root) builds gamesense3/4 via MCP HTTP to Unity on port 8081, but build settings were never updated to include the levels.

---

response.output:
# Sugar-Run 100米地图说明

## 地图总览
- **总长**：100 米（5 段，每段 20 米）
- **类型**：2D 横版平台跳跃
- **风格**：类《天天酷跑》的连续跑酷

## 分段设计

### 第一段「厨房起点」(0-20m) - 草地
- 油烟灶台+汉堡陷阱
- 可乐陷阱
- 1 支胰岛素（8m 高空）
- 尖刺群（11-15m）
- 糖块（10m 处浮空）

### 第二段「餐桌跳跃」(20-40m) - 泥土
- 7 个高低平台连续跳跃
- 沙发陷阱（红方块）
- 2 处苹果回血
- 1 支胰岛素（28m）
- 可乐 + 汉堡陷阱各 1
- 全麦面包（34m）
- 尖刺群（31-33m）

### 第三段「食物工厂」(40-60m) - 石头
- 高空工厂平台（42m, 48m, 54m）
- **2 只糖怪巡逻**（43m, 50m）
- 锯子障碍（46m）
- 紧急糖块（48m 问号砖块，隐藏）
- 第 3 支胰岛素（45m）
- 5 颗糖果堆（41-43m）
- 工厂墙（蓝方块，50-51m）
- 尖刺群（56-58m）

### 第四段「血管管道」(60-80m) - 沙地
- 8 段管道连续跳跃
- **2 只糖怪**（65m, 73m）
- 红细胞漂浮物
- 第 4 支胰岛素（64m）
- 1 处苹果、1 处全麦面包
- 汉堡 + 可乐陷阱
- 尖刺跨越（78-79m）

### 第五段「诊室走廊」(80-100m) - 雪地
- 沙发陷阱（82m）
- 苹果回血
- 第 5 支胰岛素（87m）
- **糖怪**（89m）
- 可乐 + 全麦陷阱
- 终末糖怪（95m）
- **诊室门**（99m）= 终点

## 通关条件
- 抵达诊室门 (99m)
- 当前血糖 3.0-7.0 mmol/L
- 收集至少 **3 支胰岛素**（共 5 支可收集）
- 剩余生命 ≥ 1

## 操作
- A / ←：向左
- D / →：向右
- W / ↑ / 空格：跳跃

## 文件位置
- 场景：`Assets/Scenes/gamesense1.scene`
- 玩家脚本：`Assets/Scripts/PlayerController.cs`
- 相机脚本：`Assets/Scripts/CameraFollow.cs`
- 资源：Kenney New Platformer Pack（`Assets/kenney_new-platformer-pack-1.1/`）

## Unity Project Exploration Report — E:\unity\projs\final_proj

This is a **2D platformer "Sugar-Run" (血糖跑酷)** game about a character navigating a body/food-themed environment (kitchen → intestine interior). Uses URP 2D, TextMesh Pro, and Kenney platformer assets.

---

### 1. Scene Files (*.unity / *.scene)

**Project scenes (Assets/Scenes/):**
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense1.scene` — "厨房起点/100米跑酷" main parkour level (built by BuildMap.cs)
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense2.scene` — level 2
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense2_backup.scene` — backup of level 2
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense3.scene` — "Underground Cavern" (built by build_scenes_3_4.py)
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense4.scene` — "Sky Fortress" (built by build_scenes_3_4.py)
- `Assets\Scenes\SampleScene.scene` — the ONLY scene in build settings
- `Assets\Settings\Scenes\URP2DSceneTemplate.scene` — URP template

Plus plugin/pack scenes: 26 TextMesh Pro example `.unity` scenes + `Assets\BTM_Items_Gems\Scenes\Gems Sample Scene.unity`.

---

### 2. C# Scripts (project-specific, all read)

**Assets/Scripts/ (16 game scripts):**
- `PlayerController.cs` — Core player. Rigidbody2D platformer movement (A/D/←/→, W/↑/Space jump), ground check via OverlapBox, potion system (Q to use, drains sugar), respawn, reactivates pickups on death. Exposes `controlsReversed`, `moveSpeed`, `jumpForce`.
- `StatusUI.cs` — **Main HUD/Canvas.** Hunger & sugar bars (filled Images), value texts, potion count UI, victory panel ("恭喜通关！"). Depletes hunger/sugar over time; death triggers PlayerController.Respawn(). Has `ShowVictory()`, `AddSugar/AddHunger`, `pauseDepletion`.
- `StatusEffect.cs` — Applies status-driven effects: low-hunger near-death adrenaline (1.5x), low-stamina slowdown, high-sugar slowdown + HP drain + reverse controls when sugar<20, red screen flash overlay, camera shake loop. Tied to StatusUI & CameraFollow.
- `SugarStateVisual.cs` — Visual aura/tint based on sugar level (high>70 orange aura, low<20 blue aura), generates glow sprites procedurally, drives Animator "SugarState" int.
- `TrophyItem.cs` — **Trophy/goal.** Adds trigger BoxCollider2D; on player contact calls StatusUI.ShowVictory().
- `PlayerImmunity.cs` — Temporary invulnerability (pauses status depletion), procedural ring aura sprite, pulsing.
- `ImmunityPickup.cs` — Trigger pickup that activates PlayerImmunity on player.
- `FoodItem.cs` — Edible pickup; adds sugarBonus + hungerBonus to StatusUI. Auto-adds CircleCollider2D.
- `PotionItem.cs` — Pickup adding a potion to PlayerController (max 3).
- `CameraFollow.cs` — Ortho camera follow with dynamic zoom based on player height, exposes `shakeOffset`.
- `VideoBackground.cs` — **Video background player.** Requires VideoPlayer; renders mp4 to RenderTexture on a quad sized to camera. Default video `"大肠内部.mp4"`. Falls back to solid color.
- `AcidFlow.cs` — Animated waving liquid surface mesh (replaces SpriteRenderer with MeshRenderer).
- `MoveVertical.cs` / `MoveHorizontal.cs` — Simple sine-wave oscillating platform movement.
- `FloatObject.cs` (namespace Benjathemaker) — Rotate/float/scale animation for collectibles (used by Trophy prefab).
- `DeathZone.cs` — Trigger that respawns the player.

**Assets/Editor/ (2 editor tools):**
- `BuildMap.cs` — Menu "Tools/Build 100m Parkour Map" procedurally generates gamesense1.scene (tiles, platforms, spikes, saws, pickups, decorations) from Kenney sprites, creates prefabs.
- `FoodBaker.cs` — Menu "Tools/Bake Food Prefabs" bakes FBX food models into prefabs with FoodItem stats (Hamburger/Hotdog/Cheese/Banana/Cherry/Olive/Watermelon).

**Other:** `Assets\BTM_Items_Gems\Scripts\SimpleGemsAnim.cs` (Benjathemaker) — same float/rotate/scale anim as FloatObject, from a gems asset pack.

(TextMesh Pro `Examples & Extras\Scripts\` contains ~27 demo scripts — third-party, not project logic.)

---

### 3. "开场动画" (Opening Animation) Assets

**FOUND:** `Assets\开场动画.mp4` (opening animation video).
Additional videos in Assets root:
- `Assets\大肠内部.mp4`, `大肠内部2.mp4`, `大肠内部3.mp4`, `大肠内部4.mp4` (large-intestine interior backgrounds — used by VideoBackground.cs, default = 大肠内部.mp4).
- Animation clips: `Assets\idle.anim`, `walk.anim`, `jump.anim`, `highSugarIdle.anim`, `lowSugarIdle.anim`, `Assets\role5.controller`.
- There is NO dedicated "开场动画" folder, just the mp4 file. No script currently plays 开场动画.mp4 specifically (VideoBackground defaults to 大肠内部.mp4).

---

### 4. UI-Related Scripts / Canvas Objects

- **Scripts:** `StatusUI.cs` (HUD + victory panel, uses UnityEngine.UI + TMPro) and `StatusEffect.cs` (creates flash overlay Image on Canvas).
- **Canvas objects in scenes:** A `StatusCanvas` (with Canvas component + CanvasRenderers) exists in gamesense1.scene, gamesense2.scene, and gamesense3.scene. (gamesense4 and SampleScene were generated by the python builder and did not show a StatusCanvas.)
- Victory UI is created dynamically by StatusUI.ShowVictory() if no victoryPanel is assigned.

---

### 5. Build Settings (ProjectSettings\EditorBuildSettings.asset)

**Only 1 scene is in the build, in this order:**
1. `Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.scene` (enabled, guid 8c9cfa26abfee488c85f1582747f6a02)

⚠️ NOTE: The actual game levels (gamesense1–4) are NOT in the build settings — only SampleScene is. `build_scenes_3_4.py` (root) builds gamesense3/4 via MCP HTTP to Unity on port 8081, but build settings were never updated to include the levels.

---

### 6. Trophy / 奖杯 Scripts & Prefabs

- **Script:** `Assets\Scripts\TrophyItem.cs` — triggers victory on player contact.
- **Prefab:** `Assets\Prefabs\Trophy.prefab` — based on an FBX model (guid d0958d2a40711a441af583beb71f5bf1), scaled 0.7, with a `FloatObject` MonoBehaviour attached (rotating Y + floating). **Note: TrophyItem.cs is NOT attached to this prefab** — the prefab only has FloatObject; TrophyItem would need to be added for the trophy to actually trigger victory.
- **Trophy instances in scenes:** present in gamesense1.scene, gamesense2.scene, gamesense3.scene.
- Also a separate pack asset: `Assets\BTM_Items_Gems\Prefabs\Trophy.prefab` and `Assets\kenney_mini-arena\Models\...\trophy.fbx/obj` (3D models, unused by game logic).

---

### 7. Audio Manager / Volume Control Scripts

**NONE EXIST.** No `AudioManager`, no volume control, no `AudioSource`/`PlayOneShot` references in any project script (search of Assets/Scripts returned no matches). The only audio in scenes is an `AudioListener` component on the Main Camera (gamesense1–4, SampleScene). Sound effects DO exist as files — `Assets\kenney_new-platformer-pack-1.1\Sounds\sfx_*.ogg` (jump, hurt, coin, gem, magic, bump, etc.) — but **no script plays them**. This is a gap: audio assets are present but unused.

---

### 8. GameManager / LevelManager Script

**NONE EXIST.** No `GameManager` or `LevelManager` class anywhere in the project. Game state is instead managed in a decentralized way: `StatusUI` holds hunger/sugar/death/victory state, `PlayerController` handles respawning & potion count, and there is no scene-transition or level-progression coordinator. There is also no script to transition between gamesense1→2→3→4.

---

### Summary of Gaps Found
- Build settings list only SampleScene; the 4 real levels aren't in the build.
- No GameManager/LevelManager for scene flow / progression.
- No AudioManager; SFX .ogg files exist but are never played.
- `Trophy.prefab` lacks the `TrophyItem` component, so the victory trigger may not fire unless added in-scene.
- `开场动画.mp4` exists but no script plays it (VideoBackground plays 大肠内部.mp4).
args.next_steps: Likely follow-ups for the main agent: (1) Add gamesense1–4 scenes to EditorBuildSettings in the correct order and add an opening/intro scene; (2) Create a script (or extend VideoBackground) to play 开场动画.mp4 as an intro before the first level; (3) Build an AudioManager + volume control and wire up the existing sfx_*.ogg clips to PlayerController/FoodItem/TrophyItem events; (4) Add a GameManager/LevelManager to handle scene transitions gamesense1→2→3→4 and win/lose flow; (5) Ensure TrophyItem.cs is attached to Trophy.prefab (or its scene instances) so victory triggers fire; (6) Verify each scene has a StatusCanvas + StatusUI and a Player with PlayerController/StatusEffect/SugarStateVisual.

functionDeclarations.name: glob
functionDeclarations.description: Efficiently finds files matching specific glob patterns (e.g., `src/**/*.ts`, `**/*.md`), returning absolute paths sorted by modification time (newest first). Ideal for quickly locating files based on their name or path structure, especially in large codebases.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to match against (e.g., '**/*.py', 'docs/*.md').

path.description: Optional: The absolute path to the directory to search within. If omitted, searches the root directory.

case_sensitive.description: Optional: Whether the search should be case-sensitive. Defaults to false.

respect_git_ignore.description: Optional: Whether to respect .gitignore patterns when finding files. Only available in git repositories. Defaults to true.

maxResults.description: Optional: Maximum number of file paths to return (default: 1000). Use to limit output for broad patterns.

functionDeclarations.name: list_directory
functionDeclarations.description: Lists the names of files and subdirectories directly within a specified directory path. Can optionally ignore entries matching provided glob patterns.

path.description: The absolute path to the directory to list (must be absolute, not relative)

ignore.description: List of glob patterns to ignore

file_filtering_options.description: Optional: Whether to respect ignore patterns from .gitignore or .geminiignore

respect_git_ignore.description: Optional: Whether to respect .gitignore patterns when listing files. Only available in git repositories. Defaults to true.

respect_gemini_ignore.description: Optional: Whether to respect .geminiignore patterns when listing files. Defaults to true.

functionDeclarations.name: read_file
functionDeclarations.description: Reads and returns the content of a specified file. By default reads up to 2000 lines starting from the beginning of the file. Files whose selected range exceeds 256 KB are truncated with an advisory; use 'offset' and 'limit' only if the file is too large to read at once — it's recommended to read the whole file by not providing these parameters. Handles text, images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP), and PDF files. For images, videos or other multimedia files, use the 'analyze_multimedia' tool if available.

absolute_path.description: The absolute path to the file to read (e.g., '/home/user/project/file.txt'). Relative paths are not supported. You must provide an absolute path.

offset.description: Optional: For text files, the 0-based line number to start reading from. Only provide if the file is too large to read at once.

limit.description: Optional: For text files, the maximum number of lines to read. Only provide if the file is too large to read at once.

functionDeclarations.name: run_shell_command
functionDeclarations.description:
This tool executes a given shell command using the best available Windows shell (PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt).

IMPORTANT:
- This tool is for terminal operations (e.g., git / npm / docker / build & test commands).
- DO NOT use this tool for file operations like reading, writing, editing, or searching files. Prefer the dedicated file tools for those actions.
- Quote any file path that contains spaces with double quotes, e.g. `cd "/path with spaces"` or `python "/path with spaces/script.py"`.
- If a command would produce very large output, prefer adding flags/filters (narrow paths, limit counts, request specific fields, machine-readable formats like JSON) to keep output small and unambiguous.
- Very large outputs may be returned as the most recent tail of the output. Earlier content may be truncated from the beginning. If the tool reports a "Full output saved to: <path>", that file contains the full command output. Use the exact path returned by the tool, then prefer searching that file first (grep/rg or platform equivalents) for specific ERROR/WARN/FAIL/SUCCESS markers, then reading small slices (with `read_file` using `offset`/`limit`) or tailing the log file instead of re-running expensive commands.
- Do not append truncating pipelines such as `| tail`, `| Select-Object -Last`, or similar to an expensive first run just to suppress output. Those discard earlier context and force a re-run if you later need omitted lines. Let the tool/log capture the full output, then inspect the saved log file.
- When issuing multiple shell commands in one response, parallelize only when they are truly independent and do not compete for the same files, directories, logs, locks, caches, git state, or ports. If one command depends on another or shared state may race, run them sequentially.

The following information is returned:
- Command: Executed command.
- Directory: Directory where command was executed, or `(root)`.
- Output: Combined command output (stdout/stderr). Can be `(empty)` or an excerpt if very large.
- Error: Error or `(none)` if no error was reported for the subprocess.
- Exit Code: Exit code or `(none)` if terminated by signal.
- Signal: Signal number or `(none)` if no signal was received.

command.description: Exact command to execute using the best available Windows shell (automatically selected from PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt). Quote any file paths containing spaces with double quotes.

description.description: Brief description of the command for the user. Be specific and concise. Ideally a single sentence. Can be up to 3 sentences for clarity. No line breaks.

directory.description: (OPTIONAL) The absolute path of the directory to run the command in. If not provided, the project root directory is used. Must be a directory within the workspace and must already exist.

run_in_background.description: Set to true to run this command in the background. Returns immediately with task metadata and an output file path.

functionDeclarations.name: search_file_content
functionDeclarations.description: Searches for a regular expression pattern within the content of files in a specified directory, a specific file, or the current working directory. Can filter files by a glob pattern when searching directories. Returns the lines containing matches, along with their file paths and line numbers.

pattern.description: The regular expression (regex) pattern to search for within file contents (e.g., 'function\s+myFunction', 'import\s+\{.*\}\s+from\s+.*').

path.description: Optional: The absolute path to a directory or file to search within. If a file path is provided, searches only within that file. If a directory path is provided, searches all files in that directory. If omitted, searches the current working directory.

include.description: Optional: A glob pattern to filter which files are searched (e.g., '*.js', '*.{ts,tsx}', 'src/**'). Only applicable when searching directories, ignored for file searches. If omitted, searches all files (respecting potential global ignores).

maxResults.description: Optional: Maximum number of matches to return to prevent context overflow (default: 20, max: 150). Values above 150 are clamped automatically. Use lower values for broad searches, higher for specific searches.

functionDeclarations.description:

This tool must be called ALONE in its turn. Do not call any other tools in the same turn. If you still need another tool, do not call this yet.

## Unity Project Exploration Report — E:\unity\projs\final_proj

This is a **2D platformer "Sugar-Run" (血糖跑酷)** game about a character navigating a body/food-themed environment (kitchen → intestine interior). Uses URP 2D, TextMesh Pro, and Kenney platformer assets.

---

### 1. Scene Files (*.unity / *.scene)

**Project scenes (Assets/Scenes/):**
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense1.scene` — "厨房起点/100米跑酷" main parkour level (built by BuildMap.cs)
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense2.scene` — level 2
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense2_backup.scene` — backup of level 2
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense3.scene` — "Underground Cavern" (built by build_scenes_3_4.py)
- `Assets\Scenes\gamesense4.scene` — "Sky Fortress" (built by build_scenes_3_4.py)
- `Assets\Scenes\SampleScene.scene` — the ONLY scene in build settings
- `Assets\Settings\Scenes\URP2DSceneTemplate.scene` — URP template

Plus plugin/pack scenes: 26 TextMesh Pro example `.unity` scenes + `Assets\BTM_Items_Gems\Scenes\Gems Sample Scene.unity`.

---

### 2. C# Scripts (project-specific, all read)

**Assets/Scripts/ (16 game scripts):**
- `PlayerController.cs` — Core player. Rigidbody2D platformer movement (A/D/←/→, W/↑/Space jump), ground check via OverlapBox, potion system (Q to use, drains sugar), respawn, reactivates pickups on death. Exposes `controlsReversed`, `moveSpeed`, `jumpForce`.
- `StatusUI.cs` — **Main HUD/Canvas.** Hunger & sugar bars (filled Images), value texts, potion count UI, victory panel ("恭喜通关！"). Depletes hunger/sugar over time; death triggers PlayerController.Respawn(). Has `ShowVictory()`, `AddSugar/AddHunger`, `pauseDepletion`.
- `StatusEffect.cs` — Applies status-driven effects: low-hunger near-death adrenaline (1.5x), low-stamina slowdown, high-sugar slowdown + HP drain + reverse controls when sugar<20, red screen flash overlay, camera shake loop. Tied to StatusUI & CameraFollow.
- `SugarStateVisual.cs` — Visual aura/tint based on sugar level (high>70 orange aura, low<20 blue aura), generates glow sprites procedura
